title: Meeting Notes
description: Turn rough notes into decisions, action items, and follow-up questions.

prompts.name: summarize_meeting
prompts.title: Summarize Meeting
prompts.description: Extract decisions and tasks from pasted meeting notes.
prompts.template:
请整理下面的会议记录。输出：结论、待办、风险、需要追问的问题。若文本里包含待办语句，可以调用 demo MCP tool 提取任务。

{{notes}}

arguments.name: notes
arguments.description: 会议记录或语音转写文本。
